subcodes.first_line: Say: By God, the Truth! There hath appeared that which hath never appeared in creation, and it speaketh through all things, at every moment, in every tone [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل تالله الحق قد ظهر امر ما ظهر بمثله فی الابداع و انه ینطق فی کل شیء فی کل حین بکل لحن
subcodes.subjects: @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @rejection, opposition and persecution
